main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'fallo sellado interno elementos lote defectuoso + bypass alta salinidad' literal.

alternatives.justification: 3 alts brief (biofouling, sellado cabezales, daño físico).

recommended_action.justification: Extracción y autopsia 5 elementos + aislar T-04 + reemplazo si confirmado — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide resultado autopsia defecto glue line — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single: autopsia con defecto no glue → biofouling switch.
